_doc: Time Spiral Remastered (TSR) booster recipe. Generated by scripts/gen-booster-contents.mjs from data/_collation-facts/tsr.json (source: The Collation Project, lethe.xyz/mtg/collation). Edit the facts file and regenerate; do not hand-edit this file unless you also remove its facts source. Set composition: 121C / 100U / 53R / 15M. Collation: sequential, A/B/C1/C2 common runs. Occasional foil (33%) modelled by folding foil odds into one common slot. Notes: Extra-large remastered set with 121 'timeshifted' old-border reprints occupying a dedicated slot in every pack. 36 packs per box. Printed in English in the USA; figures from US Pack Anatomy. Time Spiral Remastered was sold ONLY as Draft Boosters (the 'timeshifted' bonus reprint sits in the draft pack); it had NO Collector Booster. authoritative:true hides the generic-collector fallback the date heuristic would otherwise add.
